Legal

Terms of Service

Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using the Venue Oaón website (venueoaon.co.za). By accessing or using this website, you agree to be bound by these terms.

Effective date: 20 April 2026

1. Enquiry only: no bookings confirmed online

This website is an enquiry platform only. Submitting a form, sending a message, or contacting us via any channel on this website does not constitute a confirmed booking or reservation. No booking is confirmed until you have received a written confirmation from Venue Oaón and the relevant deposit or payment has been received.

2. Venue hire subject to a separate signed agreement

All venue hire is governed by a separate Venue Hire Agreement signed between Venue Oaón and the client. The terms, conditions, cancellation policy, payment schedule, and specific venue rules are set out in that agreement. This website's Terms of Service do not constitute or replace the Venue Hire Agreement.

3. Décor packages through Oaón Events

All décor packages shown on this website are offered and executed by Oaón Events, a separate legal entity and sister company to Venue Oaón. Engaging a décor package involves a separate agreement with Oaón Events. Venue Oaón is not liable for the fulfilment of décor services.

4. Accuracy of information

We make every effort to ensure the information on this website is accurate and current. However, Venue Oaón makes no warranties, express or implied, about the completeness, accuracy, or reliability of any information on this site. Suite descriptions, capacity numbers, time slots, and package inclusions may change: always confirm current details directly with us before making decisions based on website content.

5. Pricing

Pricing is not published on this website. All pricing is provided on enquiry and is subject to change without notice. Quotations provided via email or WhatsApp are valid for the period stated in the quote.

6. Intellectual property

All content on this website, including text, images, design, and brand elements, is the property of Venue Oaón and/or its licensors. You may not reproduce, distribute, or use any content from this website without written permission.

7. Limitation of liability

To the maximum extent permitted by South African law, Venue Oaón and its owners, employees, and partners shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from:

  • Your use of or inability to use this website
  • Any reliance placed on information published on this website
  • Any booking that has not been confirmed in writing
  • Acts or omissions of Oaón Events or any third-party supplier

8. Third-party links

This website may contain links to external websites. Venue Oaón is not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or terms of those websites. Accessing third-party links is at your own risk.

9. Governing law

These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of South Africa. Any disputes arising from your use of this website shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the South African courts.

10. Changes to these terms

We reserve the right to update these Terms of Service at any time. The effective date at the top of this page will be updated accordingly. Continued use of this website after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms.

11. Contact

For any questions about these terms, please contact us at:

Venue Oaón
Montana, Pretoria, Gauteng, South Africa
info@venueoaon.co.za

An intimate event space in Montana, Pretoria for small, considered gatherings of 20–40 people.
